scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm boundaries:check
scripts.ci:control-plane:release: pnpm audit:control-plane:deployment && pnpm readiness:control-plane:production && pnpm check && pnpm build
scripts.clean:local: rm -rf .turbo node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/dist coverage
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.smoke:control-plane:api: set -a; [ ! -f .env.smoke.local ] || . ./.env.smoke.local; set +a; DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/review_agent} REDIS_URL=${REDIS_URL:-redis://localhost:6379} GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET=${GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET:-local-smoke-secret} HEIMDALL_ADMIN_ENABLED=true HEIMDALL_ADMIN_ROUTE_EXPOSURE=public HEIMDALL_ADMIN_IDENTITY_PROVIDER=${HEIMDALL_ADMIN_IDENTITY_PROVIDER:-oidc} HEIMDALL_ADMIN_IDENTITY_ASSERTION_SECRET=${HEIMDALL_ADMIN_IDENTITY_ASSERTION_SECRET:-local-admin-assertion-secret-with-32-chars} HEIMDALL_ADMIN_SESSION_SECRET=${HEIMDALL_ADMIN_SESSION_SECRET:-local-admin-session-secret-with-32-chars} HEIMDALL_ADMIN_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=${HEIMDALL_ADMIN_ALLOWED_ORIGINS:-http://localhost:3001} pnpm --filter @app/api dev
scripts.smoke:control-plane:local: set -a; [ ! -f .env.smoke.local ] || . ./.env.smoke.local; set +a; API_URL=${API_URL:-http://localhost:3000} HEIMDALL_ADMIN_SMOKE_ASSERTION_URL=${HEIMDALL_ADMIN_SMOKE_ASSERTION_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:4317/assertion} HEIMDALL_ADMIN_SMOKE_ORG_ID=${HEIMDALL_ADMIN_SMOKE_ORG_ID:-org_local} HEIMDALL_ADMIN_SMOKE_REPO_ID=${HEIMDALL_ADMIN_SMOKE_REPO_ID:-repo_local} HEIMDALL_ADMIN_SMOKE_ALLOW_LOCAL_TARGET=true bun run scripts/control-plane-staging-smoke.ts
